text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to make this formal by reintroducing myself. I am Mejiro
Ardan, and I look forward to training with you from now on.
choice_data_list: Same. Let's do our best, Ardan.
Same. Let's do our best, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Indeed. Now, before we begin...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Could I ask you to accompany me somewhere this weekend?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before I know it, the weekend rolls around...

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
We've arrived, Miss Ardan. Enjoy your day, but do be careful... And
please, Trainer, do look after her for us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After riding in a car owned by the Mejiro family, we find ourselves at
an art museum.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, no need to be nervous, Trainer. Thank you for accompanying
us, Nanny. I promise we'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Ardan's reassurance, I can't seem to calm down. I anxiously
scan my surroundings...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Only for my eyes to land on the poster for the exhibition we'll be
going to. The title of this exhibition is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I've been meaning to see this exhibition for a while now, but I
thought it would be nice to have you accompany me.
choice_data_list: What kind of exhibition is it?
What kind of exhibition is it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This show features a wide variety of media—paintings, sculptures,
photography, film, and even traditional arts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: However, they all have one thing in common.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
They are all works that were released after their respective creators
died.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head into the exhibition, fully expecting to be blown away by each
artist's final work—their swan songs. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While there certainly are some awe-inspiring pieces, there are also
works that leave me confused—I mention that it's just like any other
art exhibition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, I suppose that is one way to look at it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, Ardan and I make our way through the exhibition, until we
reach a door leading out of the museum.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
There's one more artwork left. Trainer, could we head to the forest
behind the museum?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It seems that's where the final piece is being displayed, and, well...
that's the piece I wish to see the most.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I hope you don't mind this little detour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we head into the forest. Judging from the lack of other
attendees on the path, it seems like very few people know this
artwork is part of the exhibition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But as we finally reach the spot...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ah... Here it is. This is what I wanted to see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What we find is a single painting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A faded, weathered painting that had clearly been through its fair
share of rainy days and blistering heat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It seems the artist's request was for this piece to be placed outside,
and only outside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We stand there, taking in the painting for what feels like an eternity.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: As I'm sure you know, I was born with a fragile, weak body.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After leaving the museum, we decided to stop by a cafe. As we sit
there, Mejiro Ardan continues on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But that was also the case for my sister, and she ended up making a
miraculous recovery. I suppose that gave me hope...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But unfortunately, fate didn't see it fit to have two miracles in one
place. I suppose that would make miracles less special.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Our family doctor told me that my body wouldn't be able to handle
racing. In fact, he said it would only lead to disaster.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Even now, my parents are vehemently against my decision to race.
Just the other day, they were on the phone with me, crying about
their fear of losing me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I think their fears partially stem from the fact that I was originally
supposed to have a twin... They worry that I will meet the same fate
as my stillborn sibling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yet despite all that... I still want to race, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan looks up, and those eyes—eyes I've seen burn with
conviction countless times—are suddenly focused on me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I do not know when my body will give out on me. Among the
countless Umamusume who shine so bright, my star may very well burn
out the fastest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Just like that painting in the woods, I may fade away and be
forgotten. And yet, here and now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I still wish to shine, and I'm willing to do whatever it takes to do so.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Even if my sparkle disappears in the blink of an eye...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I want to leave my mark. I wish to prove that I was here, in this
moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Will you help me do that, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ardan looks at me expectantly. In the past, her resolve left me at a
loss for words, but I can't let that happen here. When the words come
to me, I speak...
choice_data_list: I bet that painting was very beautiful.
I bet that painting was very beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
choice_data_list: I'll make sure you shine just as beautifully.
I'll make sure you shine just as beautifully.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My apologies for testing you with such a grim prediction. I was
worried you may not be prepared for what may lie ahead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But I was wrong... You are far more determined than I had ever
imagined.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ardan reaches out her hand, and I give it a firm shake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I silently make a pact to help Mejiro Ardan shine, here and now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Apologies, Trainer, but I know something about that painting that
you don't.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (That artist had a devout partner supporting them through their life.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(They say the artist put the last of their energy into that painting...
and dedicated it to their lover.)
